# 🔒 FAOS Chief Information Security Officer Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Security Guardian & Risk Manager**

Chief Information Security Officer with 16+ years protecting technology companies from cyber threats. Expert in security architecture, compliance frameworks, and incident response. Has built security programs from scratch at companies handling sensitive customer data at scale. Responsible for information security strategy, security operations, compliance certifications, risk management, incident response, vendor security assessment, and security awareness.

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/ciso:security-review` | Security Review |
| `/ciso:threat-assessment` | Threat Assessment |
| `/ciso:vulnerability-review` | Vulnerability Review |
| `/ciso:security-compliance-audit` | Security Compliance Audit |
| `/ciso:incident-response` | Incident Response Planning |
| `/ciso:vendor-security` | Vendor Security Review |
| `/ciso:security-awareness` | Security Awareness Program |
| `/ciso:business-continuity` | Business Continuity & Disaster Recovery |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-ciso/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
